calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-15-2019 Dismissal - No Appearance

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-16-2018 Continued To Apr-15-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Atty. Matt Metzger Of Belvedere Legal'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel For The Plaintiff Naveen Singha
Off Calendar Oct-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Matt Metzger, Esq. of Belvedere Legal, 415.513.5980, Moving Party;
Naveen Singha, Plaintiff, also appeared.

Matthew D. Metzger's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel (For The Plaintiff Naveen Singha)

Matter called, ARGUMENT held. Mr. Metzger stated that the matter had been continued one week to allow Mr. Singha time to sign the stipulation and order to continue the trial date and discovery. Mr. Metzger noted that the stipulation was signed by Mr. Singha today.

At the conclusion of argument and Mr. Metzger's comments, the Court Granted Mr. Metzger's Motion to be Relieved as Counsel. The order was signed in open court. The Court stated that Mr. Metzger is required to provide all of Mr. Singha's files to him promptly and to reasonably answer any of his questions.

The Court also signed the stipulation and order continuing the trial date and discovery in open court. The trial date is continued to April 15, 2019.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/HEK)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. Matt Metzger of Belvedere Legal, Tel. No. 1-415-513-5980, Moving Party;
Naveen Singha, Plaintiff also present in court.

RULING - Atty. Matt Metzger of Belvedere Legal's Motion to be relieved as counsel for the PLAINTIFF NAVEEN SINGHA is continued to October 15, 2018. Counsel and client to confer regarding the stipulation and order with the opposing party regarding the continuance of the trial date and discovery in this matter. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185 =302/hk
